case_title: LUIZZI, GERALD vs. BIRKHIMER, DENNIS et al

docket_entries.description: GENERAL NEGLIGENCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUIZZI, GERALD AS TO DEFENDANT BIRKHIMER, DENNIS DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          FEB-19-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-23-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-30-1997
CIVIL COVER SHEET (JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM) FILED.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-19-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON FEB-19-1997, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND OSC TO PLAINTIFF FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES. HEARING SET FOR MAR-21-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS & COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUIZZI, GERALD SERVED NOV-20-1996, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BIRKHIMER, DENNIS

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS & COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUIZZI, GERALD SERVED NOV-22-1996, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT BIRKHIMER, DENNIS
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE.
